name: PAY_COST_CLASSIFICATIONS_VL
query: SELECT pcctl.CLASSIFICATION_NAME CLASSIFICATION_NAME, pcc.COST_CLASSIFICATION_ID COST_CLASSIFICATION_ID, pcc.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pcc.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pcc.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pcc.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pcc.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pcc.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pcc.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pcc.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID FROM PAY_COST_CLASSIFICATIONS pcc, PAY_COST_CLASSIFICATIONS_TL pcctl WHERE pcctl.COST_CLASSIFICATION_ID = pcc.COST_CLASSIFICATION_ID AND pcctl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
